title: Arena State Machine & Round Logic
goal: Implement the arena round-management logic using Streamlit session state. Track the current round number, active models, eliminated models, and arena completion status. Provide functions for round advancement, model elimination, and state reset.

in_scope: Initialize arena session state keys: arena_round, arena_active_models, arena_eliminated_models, arena_completed, arena_winner
Create arena state initialization function that sets round 1 with all selected models active
Create advance_round() function that eliminates unselected models and increments round
Create reset_arena() function that clears all arena state and returns to initial selection
Detect arena completion when one active model remains and set arena_winner
Auto-complete arena if only one model remains after inference
Validate that at least one winner is selected before advancing
Keep arena state resilient across Streamlit reruns
out_of_scope: Persistence of arena state beyond session (Week 3 scope)

inputs: PRD Week 1 section 4 — Arena elimination flow
outputs: src/arena.py — new module with arena state management functions
dependencies: 1_arena_engine/Part 01 — feature_arena_elimination flag must be available in config
checklist: Define ARENA_STATE_KEYS constant listing all arena session state keys
Create init_arena(selected_deployments) function that initializes arena_round=1, arena_active_models=selected_deployments, arena_eliminated_models=[], arena_completed=False, arena_winner=None
Create get_active_models() function that returns current arena_active_models from session state
Create get_eliminated_models() function that returns current arena_eliminated_models from session state
Create get_current_round() function that returns current arena_round from session state
Create is_arena_completed() function that returns arena_completed from session state
Create advance_round(winner_names) function that moves non-winners to eliminated list, keeps winners as active, increments round
In advance_round(), validate that winner_names is non-empty — raise ValueError if empty
In advance_round(), after updating active models, check if len(active) == 1 and set arena_completed=True, arena_winner=active[0]
Create reset_arena() function that clears all ARENA_STATE_KEYS from session state
Create is_arena_initialized() function that checks whether arena state keys exist in session state
acceptance_criteria: init_arena() correctly sets all arena state keys in st.session_state
advance_round(['model_a']) with ['model_a', 'model_b'] active moves 'model_b' to eliminated and keeps 'model_a' active
advance_round() with empty winner list raises ValueError
Arena auto-completes when one model remains after advancement
reset_arena() clears all arena keys and allows fresh initialization
get_current_round() returns incrementing round numbers across advances
Arena state persists across Streamlit reruns within a session
Functions are testable without Streamlit dependency via mocked session state
review_focus: Session state key naming avoids collisions with existing app state keys
State mutation is explicit and traceable (no hidden side effects)
Round advancement logic handles edge cases (single model selected, all models selected as winners)
Elimination correctly moves models between active and eliminated lists
risks_or_notes: Streamlit reruns the script on each interaction — arena state must be in st.session_state to survive
If the user changes the deployment selection mid-arena, consider whether to auto-reset or warn
The model identity comparison should use deployment_name as the unique key
Consider providing arena state as a snapshot dict for easier testing and debugging
definition_of_done: src/arena.py exists with all listed functions
Arena initialization, advancement, and reset work correctly
Round number increments properly across multiple advances
Auto-completion triggers when one model remains
Validation prevents advancement with zero winners
